'''Nova Squadron''' was a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] unit that served both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==History==
The B-wings of Nova Squadron flew as part of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Their wing surfaces were colored dark gray with yellow sun-stripe markings.

Nova Squadron later flew as part of the fighter complement of the ''[[Mon Remonda]]'', during the [[Solo Fleet]]'s search for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. They flew several missions while under the command of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. They took part in the attack on ''[[Razor's Kiss]]'' after it was stolen by Zsinj. [[Wraith Squadron]], followed by [[Screaming Wookiee Squadron]] escorted the B-wings during the attack while they fired upon [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']].

Nova Squadron flew in several sorties during the Zsinj Campaign, including [[Levian Two]], [[Vahaba asteroid belt|Vahaba]], and [[Selaggis system/Legends|Selaggis]]. The squadron suffered heavy losses at the [[Battle of Selaggis]] when the ''[[Second Death]]'' exploded.
